name: The Modest Explorer
description: A no-fuss adventure companion built for weekend trails and forest paths. Lightweight frame, reliable gears, and just enough ruggedness to handle unpaved roads without breaking a sweat.

name: The Solar Drifter
description: Equipped with solar panels and a sleek utility rack, the Solar Drifter is built for those who want to stay off the grid without giving up comfort. Cruise longer, charge smarter.

name: The Urban Phantom
description: Designed for city streets that never sleep. The Urban Phantom cuts through traffic with a slim profile, responsive brakes, and a matte finish that turns heads at every intersection.

name: The Ridge Runner
description: Built for elevation. The Ridge Runner tackles mountain terrain with a reinforced steel frame, wide-grip tires, and a suspension fork that absorbs every rock and root the trail throws at you.

name: The Basecamp Beast
description: Your base camp on two wheels. Comes loaded with pannier mounts, a rear cargo platform, and an all-terrain drivetrain. Pack heavy, ride far, stop nowhere you don't want to.

name: The Velvet Cruiser
description: Luxury meets the open road. The Velvet Cruiser features a hand-stitched leather saddle, swept-back handlebars, and a whisper-quiet ride that makes every commute feel like a Sunday stroll.

name: The Summit King
description: When the trail ends, the Summit King keeps going. Dual hydraulic disc brakes, a carbon-reinforced fork, and aggressive tread tires make this the last bike you'll ever need to buy for off-road.

name: The Greenline Glider
description: Eco-conscious and elegantly built. The Greenline Glider uses recycled aluminum tubing and a bamboo deck insert, proving that sustainable choices don't have to compromise on style or speed.

name: The Nomad X
description: Cross continents, not just counties. The Nomad X is a long-haul touring bike with a water tank mount, integrated GPS dock, and a 21-speed drivetrain that handles everything from coastal flats to highland passes.

name: The Grand Tourer
description: The pinnacle of long-distance comfort. Premium ergonomic saddle, vibration-dampening frame inserts, and a belt drive system that requires zero maintenance. Built for riders who refuse to compromise.

name: The Desert Fox
description: Sand, gravel, hardpan — the Desert Fox was made for arid conditions. Fat tires with self-cleaning tread, a heat-resistant frame coat, and a sealed bearing system that laughs at dust and grit.

name: The Prestige
description: Reserved for those who want the absolute best. The Prestige comes with a titanium frame, Shimano Ultegra groupset, and a custom paint finish. Fewer than 100 units made per year. Ride one and you'll understand why.
